verdict: NOT freeze-READY as committed. Mechanically the DRAFT would freeze today (C-3), but freezing it would pin the SUPERSEDED v2-store three-arm design against the registered Option-B rulings (ASM-1080..1088) and the issue-17 v4 acceptance — the record's own prefreeze_gates_evidence still says the quality-gate precondition is ESCALATED.
